title: SpinConnectionBundle
description: A serialized spin connection on Y_h with two physically distinct parts: the Levi-Civita part (from Y_h geometry) and the gauge-coupling part (from bosonic omega via representation rho(T_a)). These are independent: changing the mesh affects only the LC part; changing the bosonic background affects only the gauge-coupling part. The variation dD_h/domega comes ONLY from the gauge-coupling part.

bundleId.description: Unique identifier for this spin connection bundle

spinorSpecId.description: SpinorRepresentationSpec ID this bundle was assembled for

branchManifestId.description: Branch manifest ID governing the spin connection construction

leviCivitaSourceId.description: Source ID for the Levi-Civita spin connection Omega^LC_spin. References the geometry/mesh artifact from which LC coefficients were computed. When the flat LC assumption is active (P4-IA-003), set to 'flat-assumption-P4-IA-003' — do NOT use null. This makes the choice explicit and auditable.

leviCivitaStorageRef.description: Artifact path for the serialized LC connection coefficients. Null when flat assumption is active.

gaugeCouplingSourceId.description: Source ID for the gauge-coupling part: references the bosonic BackgroundRecord from which omega was extracted. This is the backgroundId. Changing this ID changes the boson-fermion coupling vertex.

gaugeRepresentationId.description: Gauge representation ID specifying rho(T_a): how gauge generators act on spinors. Branch parameter. Default: adjoint-v1.

gaugeCouplingStorageRef.description: Artifact path for the serialized gauge-coupling coefficients omega_mu^a * rho(T_a)

flatLcAssumptionActive.description: Whether the flat LC assumption P4-IA-003 is active (LC part set to zero). When true, leviCivitaSourceId must be 'flat-assumption-P4-IA-003'.
